page.title: Category:Articles needing additional references from 2022nd year 3月

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing the pages

Immanuelle moved page [[Category:Articles needing additional references from 2022年3月]] to [[Category:Articles needing additional references from 2022nd year 3月]]: Text replacement - "2年" to "2nd year "
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: empty category redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Articles needing additional references from 2022nd year 3月]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
